$description: Tag component color tokens for all tag color variants and states.

background-blue.$description: Background color for blue tags. Use for informational tags or to categorize content with blue semantic meaning.

background-cool-gray.$description: Background color for cool gray tags. Use for neutral categorization or when color semantics are not needed.

background-cyan.$description: Background color for cyan tags. Use for tags related to data, analytics, or technical information.

background-gray.$description: Background color for gray tags. Use for default or neutral tags without specific semantic meaning.

background-green.$description: Background color for green tags. Use for success states, positive indicators, or approved/active status.

background-magenta.$description: Background color for magenta tags. Use for creative, design-related, or special category tags.

background-purple.$description: Background color for purple tags. Use for premium features, special status, or priority indicators.

background-red.$description: Background color for red tags. Use for error states, critical issues, or urgent/high-priority items.

background-teal.$description: Background color for teal tags. Use for tags related to support, help, or secondary informational content.

background-warm-gray.$description: Background color for warm gray tags. Use for neutral categorization with a warmer tone than cool gray.

border-blue.$description: Border color for blue tags. Provides visual definition and contrast for blue tag variants.

border-cool-gray.$description: Border color for cool gray tags. Provides visual definition and contrast for cool gray tag variants.

border-cyan.$description: Border color for cyan tags. Provides visual definition and contrast for cyan tag variants.

border-gray.$description: Border color for gray tags. Provides visual definition and contrast for gray tag variants.

border-green.$description: Border color for green tags. Provides visual definition and contrast for green tag variants.

border-magenta.$description: Border color for magenta tags. Provides visual definition and contrast for magenta tag variants.

border-purple.$description: Border color for purple tags. Provides visual definition and contrast for purple tag variants.

border-red.$description: Border color for red tags. Provides visual definition and contrast for red tag variants.

border-teal.$description: Border color for teal tags. Provides visual definition and contrast for teal tag variants.

border-warm-gray.$description: Border color for warm gray tags. Provides visual definition and contrast for warm gray tag variants.

color-blue.$description: Text color for blue tags. Ensures readable contrast against blue tag backgrounds.

color-cool-gray.$description: Text color for cool gray tags. Ensures readable contrast against cool gray tag backgrounds.

color-cyan.$description: Text color for cyan tags. Ensures readable contrast against cyan tag backgrounds.

color-gray.$description: Text color for gray tags. Ensures readable contrast against gray tag backgrounds.

color-green.$description: Text color for green tags. Ensures readable contrast against green tag backgrounds.

color-magenta.$description: Text color for magenta tags. Ensures readable contrast against magenta tag backgrounds.

color-purple.$description: Text color for purple tags. Ensures readable contrast against purple tag backgrounds.

color-red.$description: Text color for red tags. Ensures readable contrast against red tag backgrounds.

color-teal.$description: Text color for teal tags. Ensures readable contrast against teal tag backgrounds.

color-warm-gray.$description: Text color for warm gray tags. Ensures readable contrast against warm gray tag backgrounds.

hover-blue.$description: Background color for blue tags on hover. Use when blue tags are interactive or dismissible.

hover-cool-gray.$description: Background color for cool gray tags on hover. Use when cool gray tags are interactive or dismissible.

hover-cyan.$description: Background color for cyan tags on hover. Use when cyan tags are interactive or dismissible.

hover-gray.$description: Background color for gray tags on hover. Use when gray tags are interactive or dismissible.

hover-green.$description: Background color for green tags on hover. Use when green tags are interactive or dismissible.

hover-magenta.$description: Background color for magenta tags on hover. Use when magenta tags are interactive or dismissible.

hover-purple.$description: Background color for purple tags on hover. Use when purple tags are interactive or dismissible.

hover-red.$description: Background color for red tags on hover. Use when red tags are interactive or dismissible.

hover-teal.$description: Background color for teal tags on hover. Use when teal tags are interactive or dismissible.

hover-warm-gray.$description: Background color for warm gray tags on hover. Use when warm gray tags are interactive or dismissible.
